title: Haunted House Safety Briefing
text:
## Haunted House Safety Briefing

Before entering the {adjective} haunted house, secure all {plural noun} and silence your {object}.

If a ghost says {silly word}, do not {verb}; simply walk {adverb} toward the {place} exit.

Guests may encounter a {color} {animal}, {number} floating {body part}, or {person} {verb ending in -ing} in the mirror room.

No {food} near the cursed {noun}.

If you feel {emotion}, notify the nearest {job} immediately by {day of week}.
